title: arctomecon humilis
intro: Arctomecon humilis, also known as the Desert Marigold or Bearclaw Poppy, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Arctomecon humilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support immune function. Arctomecon humilis can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions and promote overall health.
